name: SHOULDER INNOVATIONS, INC.
business: Shoulder Innovations, Inc. sells advanced implant systems for shoulder arthroplasty, including anatomic and reverse total shoulder systems. Its ecosystem includes preoperative planning technology (ProVoyance), efficient instrument systems, specialized support, and surgeon collaboration. The company sells to hospitals, outpatient centers, and ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) in the United States.

exposures.sentence: We currently offer advanced implant systems for shoulder arthroplasty.

ProVoyance integrates AI and ML to transform planar CT imaging into 3D renderings of patient-specific anatomy ahead of surgery, and is cleared by the United States Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ) for preoperative shoulder planning.

In December 2025, the Company announced the development of a robotics platform to design a transformative shoulder-specific micro-robotic solution designed to further enhance shoulder surgical precision, workflow efficiency, and enable exciting, new clinical approaches in the aTSA and rTSA markets.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of InSet 70 humeral stem
catalysts.sentence: We have received FDA 510(k) clearance expanding I-Series humeral stem product line to include certain fracture indications and commercially launched the InSet 70 in September of 2025.

catalysts.event: Announcement of development of a robotics platform
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company announced the development of a robotics platform to design a transformative shoulder-specific micro-robotic solution designed to further enhance shoulder surgical precision, workflow efficiency, and enable exciting, new clinical approaches in the aTSA and rTSA markets.

catalysts.event: FDA 510(k) clearance for metal-sensitive patient implants
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received FDA 510(k) clearance for products designed for patients with metal sensitivity.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. shoulder arthroplasty market of approximately $1.7 billion in 2025, based on ~250,000 procedures
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that approximately 250,000 shoulder arthroplasty procedures were performed in the United States in 2025, which we believe represents an approximately $1.7 billion market opportunity.

tamClaims.claim: International shoulder arthroplasty market of approximately $1.0 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Based on third-party industry research reports and our internal estimates, we estimate that the total annual international shoulder arthroplasty market is approximately $1.0 billion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Global shoulder arthroplasty market of approximately $2.7 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Together, this represents a global annual shoulder arthroplasty market of approximately $2.7 billion.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. shoulder revision market of approximately $85 million annually
tamClaims.sentence: Our near-term development efforts include a revision solution to address the $85 million annual shoulder revision market in the United States (which, based on our estimates, represents approximately 5% of the estimated $1.7 billion annual shoulder arthroplasty market in the United States).

tamClaims.claim: U.S. shoulder arthroplasty market expected to grow approximately 11% annually through 2029
tamClaims.sentence: Based on our internal estimates, knowledge of our industry and third-party data regarding the number of shoulder arthroplasty procedures performed, we expect this market to grow by approximately 11% annually through 2029.
